title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Plumbfix Birmingham Ltd
body: "Application number 5349  Applicant Screwfix Direct Limited objected to the name used by Plumbfix Birmingham Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 22 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Plumbfix Birmingham Ltd is changed to 16220536, Ltd. "
